title: cordyline neocaledonica
intro: Cordyline neocaledonica, also known as the Red Dracaena or Cabbage Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Cordyline neocaledonica include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide relief from fever and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various ailments.
